'''Jeng Seth''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the leader of [[The Skulls]], a [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop]] gang that menaced the [[Hook Nebula/Legends|Hook Nebula]]. He founded the Skulls on [[Stend VI]] when he was seventeen years old, having became tired of simple thievery and intimidating frightened store owners. When he fell in love with swoop racing and speed, he gathered a group of friends who also appreciated the sport. The Skulls at times had problems with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and several news agencies.

Seth was a muscled, cocky person who usually wore black trousers and boots. He lived to terrify others and if he couldn't have control over a situation he would become very angry.

During a swoop race on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lok/Legends|Lok]], The Skulls ran their swoops into a crowd of spectators, killing 24 people. As a result, [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Alana Walden]] of the [[Corellian Security Force]] decided that Seth should not be allowed continue committing such crimes, so she hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to capture him. Seth and Th Skulls traveled to the world [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], to participate in a swoop race in the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]], and the spacer attacked them at the [[Mos Espa Circuit|Mos Espa racing track]]. The spacer defeated the gang members and and took custody of Seth.<ref name="The Skulls scenario">{{SWGTCG|set=Threat of the Conqueror|scenario=''The Skulls'' promotional scenario}}</ref>
